zh.MOEHRINGEN, WUERTTEMBERG, Germany: 德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hans Andreas Wolff於1490年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根時，他的父親Johann Andreas Wolff20歲，母親Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik21歲。他於大約1515年與Katharina Bernd在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾岡格洛夫結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年在德國巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特莫林根享年55歲。

zh-hans.MOEHRINGEN, WUERTTEMBERG, Germany: 德国爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hans Andreas Wolff于1490年出生在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根时，他的父亲Johann Andreas Wolff20岁，母亲Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik21岁。他于大约1515年与Katharina Bernd在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾岡格洛夫结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年在德国巴登-爾特波格斯圖特加特莫林根享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wolff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Fritz, Helmut, Franz, Gerhard, Guenter, Gunter, Heinz, Klaus.
German, Danish, English, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Wolf  .

Germanized or Americanized form of various other surnames meaning ‘wolf’, e.g. Hungarian   Farkas  , Czech and Slovak   Vlk  , Slovenian and other Slavic   Volk  ,   Vovk  , and   Vuk   (see   Wolf  ).

variants.name: Wolf
meanings: German, English, Dutch, and Danish: from a short form of the various ancient Germanic compound names with the first element wolf ‘wolf’, or a byname or nickname with this meaning, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a wolf. The wolf was native throughout the forests of Europe, including Britain, until comparatively recently. In ancient and medieval times it played an important role in ancient Germanic mythology, being regarded as one of the sacred beasts of Woden. The surname of German origin is also found in many other parts of Europe, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Hungary, Czechia, Slovakia, Slovenia, and Croatia, often as a German translation of local equivalents. In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Farkas , Czech and Slovak Vlk , Slovenian Volk , Ukrainian and Slovenian Vovk , Slovenian, Croatian, and Serbian Vuk , and also Czech, Slovenian, Croatian, Slovak, and Hungarian Volf . In part, this is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ). Compare De Wolf , Wolfe , Wolff , Woolf , Woulfe , and Wulf .

Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish male personal name Volf meaning ‘wolf’, which is associated with the Hebrew personal name Binyamin (see Benjamin ). This association stems from Jacob's dying words ‘Benjamin shall ravin as a wolf: in the morning he shall devour the prey, and at night he shall divide the spoil’ (Genesis 49:27). Compare Volf .

nameMeanings.name: Hans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Andreas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The original New Testament Greek form of   Andrew  , used in the English-speaking world as a learned variant.

variants.name: Andries
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Hans Andreas Wolff was born in 1490, in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Johann Andreas Wolff, was 20 and his mother, Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik, was 21. He married Katharina Bernd about 1515, in Gangloff, Kusel, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1545, in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hans Andreas Wolff est né en 1490, à Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Johann Andreas Wolff, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Katharina Bernd environ 1515, à Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1545, à Möhringen, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hans Andreas Wolff 1490 in Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann Andreas Wolff 20 und seine Mutter Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik 21. Er hat um 1515 in Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Deutschland Katharina Bernd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1545 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Andreas Wolff è nato il nel 1490 nel Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Johann Andreas Wolff, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Katharina Bernd circa 1515, nel Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1545, nel Möhringen, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.MOEHRINGEN, WUERTTEMBERG, Germany: ドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガートムohリンジェン
ja.lifeSummary: Hans Andreas Wolffが1490年にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガートムohリンジェンで生まれた時，父Johann Andreas Wolffは20歳，母Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavikは21歳であった。約1515年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス クセルガングロッフでKatharina Berndと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートムohリンジェンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hans Andreas Wolff(이)가 1490년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트 oh링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Andreas Wolff(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1515년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 쿠셀 갱글로프에서 Katharina Bernd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 스투트가트 oh링에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Andreas Wolff nasceu em 1490, em Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann Andreas Wolff, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharina Bernd aproximadamente 1515, em Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1545, em Möhringen, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hans Andreas Wolff родился в 1490 г. в местности мoхринген, обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Johann Andreas Wolff было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharina Bernd около 1515 г. в местности ганглофф, ландкрис кусел, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1545 г. в местности мoхринген, стуттгарт, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hans Andreas Wolff nació en 1490, en Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Johann Andreas Wolff, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaretha Maria Hutter Szlavik, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Katharina Bernd aproximadamente 1515, en Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1545, en Möhringen, Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 55 años.
